top_gap_prompt: How do I build real-time financial models connected to live business data sources without spending a lot on software?
category_long: strategic finance platform for modern FP&A teams

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Mosaic lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Mosaic's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Mosaic is under-represented in third-party 'best FP&A' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How do I build real-time financial models connected to live business data sources without spending a lot on software?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best FP&A that works with NetSuite and Salesforce
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Planful vs alternatives: what should I switch to?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
